headline: Stripe names Eileen O'Mara as vice chair
summary: Stripe has promoted chief revenue officer Eileen O'Mara to vice chair — effectively making her the payment giant's top exec besides the founding Collison brothers.

headline: Salesforce Stock Is Trying—and Failing—to Avoid a 14-Day Losing Streak
summary: Salesforce  stock is trying to find a bottom as it tries to end its longest losing streak on record.  Salesforce stock has dropped for 13 straight days, a record, and is trying to avoid a 14th consecutive-day decline.  The stock has dropped 43% this year amid broad fears that customers could use coding agents to make their own custom versions of Agentforce, Salesforce’s AI agent platform.

content.title: Salesforce Stock Is Trying—and Failing—to Avoid a 14-Day Losing Streak
content.summary: Salesforce  stock is trying to find a bottom as it tries to end its longest losing streak on record.  Salesforce stock has dropped for 13 straight days, a record, and is trying to avoid a 14th consecutive-day decline.  The stock has dropped 43% this year amid broad fears that customers could use coding agents to make their own custom versions of Agentforce, Salesforce’s AI agent platform.

headline: VCARB Partners with Salesforce to Supercharge Fan Engagement with AI, Deploying Agentforce 360
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & FAENZA, Italy, June 22, 2026--Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the world’s #1 Agentic CRM, and Visa Cash App Racing Bulls (VCARB) Formula 1 Team today announced a new partnership — unifying fans, data, and team operations on a single agentic platform to transform fan engagement, hospitality, and the race day experience.

content.title: VCARB Partners with Salesforce to Supercharge Fan Engagement with AI, Deploying Agentforce 360
content.summary: SAN FRANCISCO & FAENZA, Italy, June 22, 2026--Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the world’s #1 Agentic CRM, and Visa Cash App Racing Bulls (VCARB) Formula 1 Team today announced a new partnership — unifying fans, data, and team operations on a single agentic platform to transform fan engagement, hospitality, and the race day experience.

headline: Alphabet, Micron, SpaceX, Fervo, Salesforce, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: Alphabet  fell 5.8%, putting it on pace for its worst daily percentage decline in more than a year and weighing down the  The stock’s negative move came after John Jumper, a senior research scientist and Nobel Prize winner, said Friday he was leaving Google DeepMind for artificial-intelligence start-up Anthropic.  Analysts told Barron’s the departure is bad news for Alphabet and that it could mean the tech giant is losing the “war for talent.”  Elon Musk’s company was on pace for a third straight loss.

content.title: Alphabet, Micron, SpaceX, Fervo, Salesforce, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
content.summary: Alphabet  fell 5.8%, putting it on pace for its worst daily percentage decline in more than a year and weighing down the  The stock’s negative move came after John Jumper, a senior research scientist and Nobel Prize winner, said Friday he was leaving Google DeepMind for artificial-intelligence start-up Anthropic.  Analysts told Barron’s the departure is bad news for Alphabet and that it could mean the tech giant is losing the “war for talent.”  Elon Musk’s company was on pace for a third straight loss.

headline: Oracle (ORCL) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of enterprise software giant Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) fell 5% in the afternoon session after a confluence of high-profile AI talent departures from Alphabet, and a regulatory overhang pulled the entire communication-services and software complex lower. Alphabet fell roughly 6%. Microsoft slipped as well. When the two largest software-adjacent megacaps decline together, the sector indices follow mechanically given their index weight. But the deeper driver was the market's persistent fear that AI
